description_long: This pizzeria is a charming, multi-level Mediterranean-style building with rustic stone walls, terracotta roof tiles, and lush greenery. The main entrance opens onto a paved plaza featuring a central stone fountain, surrounded by potted plants and decorative bollards. To one side, there is a shaded outdoor seating area with round tables and yellow umbrellas, while the other side features a blue delivery van parked near the entrance. The upper level boasts a vine-covered pergola terrace, ideal for al fresco dining, and the rear of the property is bordered by a stone wall with tall cypress trees and a small garden. Architectural details include arched doorways, wooden shutters, and a mix of stucco and exposed brickwork, evoking a classic Italian ambiance.
description: A picturesque Mediterranean pizzeria with stone walls, terracotta roofs, a central fountain, and outdoor seating shaded by umbrellas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central fountain, blue van, and outdoor seating with umbrellas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone staircase, garden area, and tall cypress trees behind the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garden, cypress trees, and the back of the pizzeria with rustic stonework.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the vine-covered pergola terrace, rooftops, and both the fountain and outdoor seating area.
